name: Snake Sort Game
description: Dive into a fun snake puzzle adventure in Snake Jam Escape 3D! Move snakes in the correct order, clear the path, and solve tricky levels. Enjoy colorful 3D graphics, smooth controls, and relaxing gameplay with exciting brain puzzles. Easy to play and fun for all ages!
instructions: Mouse Drag Swipe ndash Move the snake Tap on Snake ndash Select and move Avoid Blocking ndash Move snakes in the correct order Clear All Snakes ndash Complete the level
